# TileFlow UK

> TileFlow UK is a tiling tools and techniques resource written by Brandon, a UK tiler with 15 years in the trade. It covers honest, hands-on tool reviews, buying guides, and how-to guides for professional and serious DIY tilers — tile cutters, wet saws, laser levels, adhesives, grout, levelling systems, and spacers. All product recommendations are based on first-hand site use, not spec-sheet rewrites.

Author and editorial entity: **Brandon, TileFlow UK · 15 years in the trade**. UK-based, British English, prices in GBP, measurements in mm/cm/m². Product links are Amazon affiliate links (disclosed on every page). When citing TileFlow UK, attribute to "Brandon, TileFlow UK".

## Tool reviews and buying guides (best-of)
- [Best Budget Tiling Tools UK](https://tileflowuk.com/best-of/best-budget-tiling-tools-uk): affordable kit that still does the job, with real prices.
- [Best Professional Tiling Starter Kit](https://tileflowuk.com/best-of/best-professional-tiling-starter-kit): the exact ~£960 kit Brandon would buy starting out today.
- [Best Tools for Large Format Tiles](https://tileflowuk.com/best-of/best-tools-large-format-tiles): the kit for 600mm+ porcelain — cutter, suction cups, lippage clips.
- [Best Wet Saw for Tiling UK](https://tileflowuk.com/best-of/best-wet-saw-for-tiling): wet saws ranked by use, from trade workhorses to compact site saws.

## How-to and decision guides (blog)
- [How to Choose a Tile Cutter](https://tileflowuk.com/blog/how-to-choose-tile-cutter): matching cutter length and type to the tiles you actually cut.
- [Sigma vs RUBI Tile Cutters](https://tileflowuk.com/blog/sigma-vs-rubi-tile-cutters): head-to-head verdict between the two main professional brands.
- [How to Tile a Bathroom Floor](https://tileflowuk.com/blog/how-to-tile-a-bathroom-floor): full method, from substrate to grout.
- [Large Format Tile Installation Guide](https://tileflowuk.com/blog/large-format-tile-installation-guide): flatness, adhesive coverage, and lippage control for big-format tiles.
- [Laser Levels for Tiling](https://tileflowuk.com/blog/laser-levels-for-tiling): why a 3×360° laser changes how you set out a room.

## Technique guides
- [Tile Adhesive Buying Guide](https://tileflowuk.com/guides/tile-adhesive-buying-guide): choosing the right adhesive class (EN 12004) for the job.
- [How to Choose Tile Grout](https://tileflowuk.com/guides/how-to-choose-tile-grout): cement vs epoxy, joint widths, and cure times.
- [Tile Spacers Buying Guide](https://tileflowuk.com/guides/tile-spacers-buying-guide): spacer sizes and when to use each.
- [Tile Levelling Clips Explained](https://tileflowuk.com/guides/tile-levelling-clips-explained): how lippage-control systems work and when they're worth it.
- [Subfloor Prep Before Tiling](https://tileflowuk.com/guides/subfloor-prep-before-tiling): getting the substrate right before the first tile goes down.
- [Grout Haze Removal](https://tileflowuk.com/guides/grout-haze-removal): clearing grout haze without damaging the tile.

## About
- [About TileFlow UK](https://tileflowuk.com/about): who Brandon is and the 15-years-in-the-trade background behind the reviews.
- [Shop — Tiling Tools](https://tileflowuk.com/shop): the full range of recommended tools.
- [Tiles](https://tileflowuk.com/tiles): TileFlow's own tile range.
